caption: Two men stand indoors against a wood-paneled wall. The man on the left wears a white robe and a matching grey cap, while the man on the right wears a light blue robe and a patterned cap. In the initial frames, the two men shake hands and smile. As the sequence progresses, they release their grip and stand side-by-side, facing each other. A logo for "plustv" appears in the upper left corner of the screen. A purple banner across the middle contains the text "PLUS POLITICS" and "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU". At the bottom of the screen, white text banners provide links: "WATCH ON" and "WATCH ONLINE" followed by "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV", and eventually "SUBSCRIBE" followed by "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA". The camera remains stationary throughout the clip, capturing the men from the waist up.
